ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Subway line the station belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the subway system the station belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the station */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the station record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subway_lines" (
  "line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subway line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the subway line */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the subway system the line belongs to */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code for the subway line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subway line record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subway line record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the division record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the method record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the data was collected */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  "entries" INTEGER /* Number of entries at the station */,
  "exits" INTEGER /* Number of exits at the station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, administrator, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the dataset was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_time" TEXT /* Time the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset version record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where data is collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date data is collected */,
  "collection_time" TEXT /* Time data is collected */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_schedules_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_schedules_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_divisions" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_lines" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subway line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id", "line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs_versions" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access log */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id", "version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods_types" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations_coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station */,
  "coordinate" TEXT /* Coordinate (latitude, longitude) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the coordinate record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_coordinates_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata (JSON format) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
